T0103.title: Database Dump
T0103.definition: The act of hackers stealing data from a database on a massive scale through illegal means. Methods include exploiting vulnerabilities, phishing, escalating privileges from ordinary user access to administrator-level control, and leveraging insiders with authorized access to illicitly extract and download database contents. The goal is to obtain personal information, account details, and corporate data, causing serious harm to individual privacy and business security.
